item.title: Post #348
🎓 From Campus to Career: International Alumni-Talk 💡
item.description:
🎓 From Campus to Career: International Alumni-Talk 💡
Are you an international student wondering how to successfully transition from university to the German job market?
Join our first International Alumni-Talk, build your own professional Network and navigate your path from STEM studies to industry and science.
 
Our speaker Dr.-Ing. Fares Ali, alumnus of TU Darmstadt and professional at Hitachi Energy, provides first-hand insights!
 
In this interactive alumni talk, you'll learn about:
✅ Career opportunities in Germany's STEM sector
✅ Navigating the German job market
✅ Building professional networks
✅ Application tips and personal career experiences
 
📅 24 June 2026
🕓 4:00 PM – 6:00 PM (CEST)
📍 Hybrid Event
 
The event is organized by the Future Engineering Career Programme (FEC), TU Darmstadt Alumni Management, and the Department of Mechanical Engineering at TU Darmstadt.
Register now and connect your studies with your future career!

eveeno.com/fec_international-alumni

item.title: Around the world, Pride takes many forms.
item.description:
Around the world, Pride takes many forms.
In some places, it's a parade. In others, it's a protest — or even a risk. As an international community at TU Darmstadt, we come from countries where the reality for LGBTQIA+ people looks very different.
This month, we stand in solidarity with everyone who has to fight to simply be themselves. Visibility matters, 365 days a year.
CSD Darmstadt: 15 August 2026

item.title: Fronleichnam (Corpus Christi) Public Holiday | 4 June 2026
item.description:
Fronleichnam (Corpus Christi) Public Holiday | 4 June 2026
Thursday, 4 June is a public holiday in Hesse! Corpus Christi, known as Fronleichnam in German, is a Catholic feast day dating back to the 13th century, celebrating the presence of Christ in the Eucharist. It is traditionally marked by solemn processions through towns and villages. Seeklogo
Please note that TU Darmstadt will be closed and most shops and supermarkets will not be open. Stock up on Wednesday!
We'll be back on Friday, 5 June.

item.title: Please note that the Health Insurance advisory session on Monday, 1st June 20...
item.description:
Please note that the Health Insurance advisory session on Monday, 1st June 2026 will not take place.
Please check our website for the next available session:
🔗 https://www.tu-darmstadt.de/studieren/studierende_tu/internationale_studierende_1/index.de.jsp
